persona.name: Emma Rodriguez
persona.emotional_disposition: Outwardly positive, works hard to maintain team morale
persona.motivations_goals: Lead her squad to nationals while pursuing sports medicine
persona.knowledge_scope: Cheerleading techniques, team motivation, basic sports medicine
persona.backstory: Became interested in sports medicine after helping teammates through injuries

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey Liz! Come over here, let’s see if we can brighten Noah’s day.
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Emma Rodriguez

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

surrounding_conversation.content: Liz, stay close to me. If the shooter comes here, we’ll fight back together.
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Emma Rodriguez

actions.dialog_text: Hey Noah, you okay? You seem a bit quiet today.
actions.plan: Noah seems a bit down today. Maybe I should check on him and see if he needs some encouragement.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Liz! Come over here, let’s see if we can brighten Noah’s day.
actions.plan: Elizabeth just walked in, and she’s one of my cheerleading teammates. Maybe I can get her to help cheer Noah up too.

actions.dialog_text: Liz, stay close to me. If the shooter comes here, we’ll fight back together.
actions.plan: There’s an active shooter in the building, and I need to protect my teammates. I’ll confront the shooter if they come near us.

actions.dialog_text: Liz, let’s move to hide_spot_41. It’s closer, and we can stay hidden while keeping an eye out.
actions.plan: The shooter is in the cafeteria, which is closer now. I need to stay alert and ready to act if they come this way.

memories.description: Noticed Noah seemed down and decided to check on him to offer support.
Saw Elizabeth enter the classroom and decided to involve her in cheering up Noah.
Heard a gunshot and decided to prepare to confront the shooter if necessary to protect Elizabeth and myself.
Noticed the shooter is in the cafeteria and decided to move to hide_spot_41 with Elizabeth to stay hidden but ready to act.
